creator: luis@moraguez.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)
I was a bit confused with that as well, because the README at the link you provided referenced FreeBSD Ports and the handbook, so it led me to believe that I had to submit it here.

I just found this link -> https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/development/develop-packages.html

I will close this report, and submit the PR according to the new infomation I just found.

Thank you for your time, sorry about the confusion!
